summary: Google employees are using a new AI tool named Agent Smith which automates tasks like coding. The popularity of the new tool has led Google to restrict has led to restricted access by the company .

summary: Anthropic's upcoming AI model, Claude Mythos, was leaked due to a ‘human error’. The leaked blog also revealed a new AI tier, Capybara, which could sit above the Claude Opus tier.&nbsp;

title: WhatsApp' big update ends iOS-to-Android transfer restrictions and introduces dual accounts for iPhones
summary: WhatsApp's latest update has introduced some new features like dual accounts on iOS, cross-platform chat transfer, and improved storage management. title: Redmi 15A 5G with 120Hz display and 6300mAh battery launched in India, price starts at ₹12,999
summary: Xiaomi has launched the Redmi 15A 5G in India with a 6,300mAh battery, 120Hz display, and support for various 5G bands. The phone starts at a price of ₹12,999 and will be available to buy from 3 April.

summary: Apple plans to enhance Siri by allowing third-party AI assistants to integrate, potentially launching with iOS 27. Users may interact with AI services like Google's Gemini and Anthropic's Claude through Siri, while new features will be added to improve user experience.

summary: The move, expected as part of ‌Apple's iOS ⁠27 update, ⁠would allow third-party AI apps to integrate directly with ​Siri, enabling users to route queries to services such as ​Alphabet's Gemini or Anthropic's Claude from within the assistant, according to the report.

title: AI's arrival complicates Big Tech climate goals, and some worry it's locking in more fossil fuels
summary: AI-driven data center expansion is derailing Big Tech’s climate goals. Despite record renewable purchases, emissions at companies like Google, Amazon, Microsoft and Meta have surged. Power shortages, policy shifts and urgent AI demand are increasing reliance on fossil fuels, especially natural gas.

title: Yahoo turns to AI-powered answer engine Scout to lead it back it its roots in online search
summary: Yahoo is exploring technology's next frontier with Scout, an answer engine powered by artificial intelligence. Scout seems insightful, based on its response to a question posed by The Associated Press about why one of Silicon Valley's brightest stars faded away a decade ago.

summary: Facebook has removed an interview segment featuring Kerala Opposition Leader V.D. Satheesan following a request from state police. title: RBI fines Pine Labs Rs 3.1 lakh for KYC lapses on prepaid payment instruments
summary: The move follows a statutory inspection of the fintech’s operations conducted between July 2024 and May 2025. The RBI clarified that the action is due to regulatory compliance lapses and does not affect the validity of any transactions or agreements between Pine Labs and its customers.
